name: Terraform a Planet - RPG
description:
PROJECT TERRAFORM

Will you be able to tame a deathly planet and make it be full of life?

RECOMMENDED STEPS:

1) Organize a production

2) Heat planet up

3) Populate the planet

4) Add water

5) Add the plants

6) @&!!!=π√$@$&?!?

P.S. Game on the pfp is Plan B: Terraform

P.S.S. Say what the building does and how much resources take: "Heater (takes 0.1% of resources, +0.1 temperature)"
